features.evidence: I bought this laptop in order to use for music production, and I opted for the M2 version over the M1 despite performance being almost identical simply because I wanted the extra USB-C slot so I can use it to plug in my audio interface and midi controller at the same time as charging the computer Does not come with MagSafe charger despite one of the product's main photos being a "What's included in the box", where you can clearly see it says it includes the MagSafe charger
value: average battery life in hours: 12 Hours

features.evidence: It shipped fast so i got it almost immediately, I would recommend however if you have the budget get the 15 inch instead, I got this for travelling but i mainly use a 32" monitor so the smaller screen hurts my eyes a bit- so it can be small Does not come with MagSafe charger despite one of the product's main photos being a "What's included in the box", where you can clearly see it says it includes the MagSafe charger

I bought this laptop in order to use for music production, and I opted for the M2 version over the M1 despite performance being almost identical simply because I wanted the extra USB-C slot so I can use it to plug in my audio interface and midi controller at the same time as charging the computer This way you can still charge your device while having both USB-C slots occupied

This Macbook Is wonderful, excellent value for money!, It came with not one scratch on it!, After watching reviews I kept hearing about the finger prints but didn't think i would be bothered because these things normally don't bother me and it still isn't that much but, it is definitely noticeable so beware A MagSafe cable only costs about $20, but it really should have been included
The sound quality is amazing, the touch id works well i feel like the computer is brand new! I literally have no complaints

I have been using the laptop for the past couple of days and I think that it is light weight, is easy to use and touch screen is also great It shipped fast so i got it almost immediately, I would recommend however if you have the budget get the 15 inch instead, I got this for travelling but i mainly use a 32" monitor so the smaller screen hurts my eyes a bit- so it can be small

works amazing, theres a couple scratches on the sides but very small and not noticable,the biggest thing was the space bar is a little sticky but i just got it replaced! doesnt overheat, super lightweight and fast! i love my new computer and recommend I have been using the laptop for the past couple of days and I think that it is light weight, is easy to use and touch screen is also great

I bought this laptop in order to use for music production, and I opted for the M2 version over the M1 despite performance being almost identical simply because I wanted the extra USB-C slot so I can use it to plug in my audio interface and midi controller at the same time as charging the computer

comes with basic charger so I’d advise you to get a mag and a USB thunderbolt port if your using it for studio production you know to connect your mic if it’s usb and your headphones if they is a regular jack
